# Zapier Marketplace

> The central pointer manifest that lets agents discover and install Zapier plugins across Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, and OpenAI Codex. Plugins themselves live in their home repos; this repo maintains three platform-specific `marketplace.json` files that keep the same plugin set in sync across every supported agent platform.

The repo is small and read-mostly. The four currently listed plugins are `mcp` (the Zapier MCP server), `zapier-notion` (a Notion connector), `gtm-cheat-codes` (go-to-market skills), and `agent-skills` (Zapier-authored Claude Code skills).

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/README.md): What the repo is, install commands per platform, naming convention, and how to add a plugin
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/AGENTS.md): Canonical guide for agents working in this repo — invariants, schemas, naming rules, contribution flow
- [schemas/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/schemas/README.md): JSON Schemas that validate each manifest, with provenance notes

## Manifests

- [Claude Code manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json): `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` — consumed by `/plugin marketplace add zapier/marketplace`
- [GitHub Copilot CLI manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/.github/plugin/marketplace.json): `.github/plugin/marketplace.json` — consumed by `copilot plugin marketplace add zapier/marketplace`
- [OpenAI Codex manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zapier/marketplace/main/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json): `.agents/plugins/marketplace.json` — consumed by the Codex plugin marketplace UI

## Plugin home repos

- [zapier/zapier-mcp](https://github.com/zapier/zapier-mcp): Hosted Zapier MCP server — the `mcp` plugin
- [zapier/connectors](https://github.com/zapier/connectors): App connectors — `zapier-notion` lives at `apps/notion`
- [zapier/gtm-cheat-codes](https://github.com/zapier/gtm-cheat-codes): Go-to-market skills for marketing, sales, and CS
- [zapier/agent-skills](https://github.com/zapier/agent-skills): Zapier-authored Claude Code skills

## Optional

- [Claude Code plugin marketplace docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-marketplaces): Platform reference for the Claude Code manifest format
- [GitHub Copilot CLI plugin marketplace docs](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/copilot-cli/customize-copilot/plugins-marketplace): Platform reference for the Copilot CLI manifest format
- [OpenAI Codex plugin docs](https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins): Platform reference for the Codex manifest format
